exercises.name: Lat Pulldown
exercises.suggestion_note: PR 60kg × 5-10 — start at top of rep range, RPE 7, 3-1-2 tempo

exercises.name: Cable Row
exercises.suggestion_note: Recent 50kg × 10-14 reps — hold weight, focus on upper back squeeze, 3-1-2 tempo

exercises.name: Cable Rear Delt Fly
exercises.suggestion_note: Last 5kg × 10 — hold weight, emphasise mind-muscle connection, higher rep range for rear delt

exercises.name: Barbell Curl
exercises.suggestion_note: Recent 25kg × 8 reps — strong baseline, maintain weight week 1, 3-1-2 tempo

exercises.name: Hammer Curl
exercises.suggestion_note: Recent 10kg × 9 reps — hold weight, higher reps for isolation, supplementary volume

notes: Pull day week 1 — all target muscles (lats 10, upper_back 10, rear_delts 6, biceps 8 MEV). Shoulder rehab warm-up mandatory (band external rotations 2×15/arm, band pull-aparts 2×15). No overhead pressing due to active rotator cuff tear. Tempo 3-1-2 throughout; stop 3-4 reps from failure. Total rear delt volume = 3 sets (3 additional sets on Friday to reach 6 sets/week MEV).
